storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC001

## Production Intent
The scene must capture the transition from a moment of departure to an immediate state of combat readiness. Visual focus should be split between the scale of the approaching threat (the airship fleet) and the intimate, reactive tension of the protagonists as they witness the sudden retreat of local forces.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- Green Martian Warriors (background/distant)

## Required Environments
- Deserted Martian City / Valley overlook

## Continuity Constraints
- Position of the protagonist relative to the city exit.
- Timing of the airships' appearance in the sky relative to character reaction.

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist and sola prepare to depart from the deserted Martian city.
- BT002: Green Martian Warriors (background/distant) suddenly retreat into cover.
- BT003: Twenty large, gray-painted airships descend upon the valley, triggering sudden alarm.
